## What's the prior art?

<!-- Project name, paper title, tool name, RFC number, etc. -->

## Where can we read about it?

<!-- URL, paper citation, github link, etc. -->

## Why is it relevant to antigen?

<!-- Pick all that apply: -->

- [ ] **Composition partner** — antigen could delegate witnesses to this tool
- [ ] **Distant cousin** — addresses similar problems but with different approach
- [ ] **Prior art for academic positioning** — should be cited in a future paper
- [ ] **Failure-class evidence** — provides instances of one or more antigen failure classes
- [ ] **Implementation reference** — antigen could learn from how this is built
- [ ] **Other (specify)**: _____________________________________________
